items.name: Steering column
items.inspectFor: Confirm the steering column is securely fastened and the steering wheel is secured and turns freely through its full travel; check the gear box, joints, and pitman arm for looseness.
defects: Loose or missing steering column mounting hardware
Steering wheel not secured, or a spoke cracked through or missing
Worn or weld-repaired steering joints, or a loose pitman arm
Free play beyond the Appendix A limit for the wheel diameter
items.notes: Original prose from the codified requirement. Term is 'steering column' (not 'shaft') per the CFR.

items.name: Driver seat belt
items.inspectFor: Confirm a seat belt assembly is installed at the driver's seat, securely mounted, and that it latches and adjusts. The belt must be worn whenever the vehicle is in motion.
defects: Seat belt assembly missing, cut, frayed, or not securely mounted
Latch or retractor does not hold or adjust
items.notes: 393.93 requires the assembly; the wear mandate is the separate 392.16.

items.name: Trailer air-supply / breakaway test
items.inspectFor: With the system fully charged, pull the trailer air-supply (red) knob: the tractor-protection valve must close and the trailer's emergency (breakaway) brakes must apply and hold.
defects: Tractor-protection / trailer-air-supply valve does not close as supply pressure drops into the 20-45 psi range
Trailer emergency brakes fail to apply automatically on loss of air supply
items.notes: The 20-45 psi automatic tractor-protection window and the automatic trailer breakaway application (hold >= 15 min) are codified.
